# Dropolis (Δρόπολη)

> Dropolis is the news, photo, video, and community portal for the villages of Dropoli (Northern Epirus / Southern Albania). All content is published in Modern Greek.

## About

Dropolis covers local news, cultural events, and community life across 41 villages in the Dropoli region. The site is maintained by the diaspora and local community alike.

- Language: Greek (el)
- Canonical domain: https://dropolis.net
- Sitemaps: https://dropolis.net/sitemap.xml | https://dropolis.net/api/sitemap.xml

## Public Sections

- [Homepage](https://dropolis.net/) — Featured articles, news ticker, statistics, latest content
- [News](https://dropolis.net/news) — Full article listing, filterable by category and village
- [Villages](https://dropolis.net/villages) — Directory of all 41 Dropoli villages with individual pages
- [Photos](https://dropolis.net/photos) — Photo gallery, filterable by village
- [Videos](https://dropolis.net/videos) — YouTube video gallery
- [About](https://dropolis.net/about) — About the portal
- [Contact](https://dropolis.net/contact) — Contact information
- [Press](https://dropolis.net/press) — Press and media information
- [Help](https://dropolis.net/help) — Help and FAQ

## Content Structure

- Article detail pages: https://dropolis.net/news/{id}
- Village detail pages: https://dropolis.net/villages/{id}

## Crawling Notes

- The dynamic sitemap at https://dropolis.net/api/sitemap.xml is preferred over the static one; it includes real publication dates for all articles and villages.
- The `/chat` section is excluded from indexing (real-time user-generated content).
- API routes under `/api/` are not intended for indexing.
- Full crawl guidance: https://dropolis.net/robots.txt
